violations.description: Form inputs use placeholder text as the only label. Placeholders disappear when the user starts typing, leaving no visible label. They are also not reliably announced by all screen readers as labels.
violations.reference_fix:
<label for="name">Full Name</label>
<input type="text" placeholder="Full Name" id="name">

violations.description: Links with target='_blank' open in a new tab without warning the user. This is disorienting for screen reader users and users with cognitive disabilities.
violations.reference_fix: View Schedule (opens in new tab)

violations.description: Error messages are not programmatically associated with their form fields via aria-describedby. Screen readers will not announce the error when the field is focused.
violations.reference_fix: Please enter your full name

page_description: A conference registration form using placeholders as labels, with error messages not linked to fields, and links that open in new tabs without warning.
